name: Colosseum - Cage of the Gladiator Beasts
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>檻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－コロッセウム
name_jp_tl: Cage of the Gladial Beast - Colosseum
desc: Place 1 Counter on this card each time a monster is Special Summoned from either player's Deck. All "Gladiator Beast" monsters gain 100 ATK and DEF for each of these counters on this card. If this card would be destroyed by a card effect, you can discard 1 "Colosseum - Cage of the Gladiator Beasts" to prevent this card from being destroyed.
eff: Place 1 Counter on this card each time a monster is Special Summoned from either player's Deck. All "Gladiator Beast" monsters gain 100 ATK and DEF for each of these counters on this card. If this card would be destroyed by a card effect, you can discard 1 "Colosseum - Cage of the Gladiator Beasts" to prevent this card from being destroyed.

mentions: Colosseum - Cage of the Gladiator Beasts
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
